zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多整理格局
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于窄幅震荡上行结构，价格围绕6.97附近运行，整体略偏多但缺乏强势突破，市场进入整理蓄势阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD维持轻微正值0.021，显示动能偏多但信号线缺失，短期趋势确认不足，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限。

支撑位关注6.94与6.90区域，上方阻力集中在6.98及7.05附近，当前价格贴近区间上沿，突破与否决定短线方向选择。

交易策略建议以区间思路为主，低吸接近支撑，高抛靠近阻力，若放量突破7.00可顺势跟多，否则谨慎追涨控制风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading near 6.97, showing a narrow intraday range and a mild consolidation phase after recent downward pressure. Price action remains relatively stable with only a -0.11% daily change, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The structure indicates a short-term sideways trend with slight bullish bias as price holds above recent moving support levels. Market participants appear cautious, awaiting a clearer breakout direction from this tight range.

The MACD reading at 0.021 suggests that bullish momentum is still present, though relatively weak and potentially flattening without a confirmed signal line. In the absence of RSI data, trend confirmation relies more heavily on price structure and moving averages. Trading above the 20-day SMA at 6.907 further reinforces short-term bullish resilience, indicating that dips are being absorbed by buyers near dynamic support levels zone.

The immediate support sits near 6.90, aligned with the 20-day SMA, making it a critical pivot for short-term structure. Below that, additional support levels appear at 6.85 and 6.70, where prior consolidation zones may attract buyers. On the upside, resistance is observed at 6.98, followed by 7.05 and 7.20, with a break above 7.05 likely signaling renewed bullish continuation with volume confirmation required for strength.

Traders may consider a range-trading approach while price remains compressed below resistance, focusing on buying near support and taking profits into overhead resistance zones. Long entries near 6.90 to 6.92 can be managed with a stop below 6.85 to control downside risk. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed move above 7.05 before targeting higher levels around 7.20, as false breakouts remain possible in low-volatility conditions.
